title: Set up Convex real-time backend with Next.js
summary: Install Convex, initialise the project, define schema and server functions, wire ConvexClientProvider, and use useQuery/useMutation in React components.
declaration: I will set up Convex as your real-time backend. Convex is a TypeScript-native serverless backend with reactive queries — any data change automatically pushes to all connected clients in real time. If you need a traditional SQL database (Prisma/Drizzle), say so before I begin.
